title: Marvel Avengers Super Hero Suction Dart Blaster with Targets
description:
Fire away like a super hero with the Marvel Avengers Suction Dart Blaster with Targets. This officially licensed toy features images of The Incredible Hulk, Iron Man, Captain America, Black Panther, and more of your favorite characters. Comes with 4 bright orange suction cup tipped darts and 2 small round targets, making target practice a blast! The simple to load, simple to fire pull action single fire blaster will leads to hours of fun. Makes a great holiday gift! Ages: 4+

Marvel Avengers Super Hero Suction Dart Blaster with Targets

Fire away like a super hero with the Marvel Avengers Suction Dart Blaster with Targets. This officially licensed toy features images of The Incredible Hulk, Iron Man, Captain America, Black Panther, and more of your favorite characters. Comes with 4 bright orange suction cup tipped darts and 2 small round targets, making target practice a blast! The simple to load, simple to fire pull action single fire blaster will leads to hours of fun. Makes a great holiday gift!

Key Features

  • OFFICIALLY LICENSED TOY - This Officially licensed Marvel Avengers toy features awesome images of Iron Man, Captain America, Incredible Hulk, Black Panther and more of your favorites
  • CLASSIC DART TOY DESIGN - Fun never goes out of style with the classic single dart pullback action and suction darts that you may remember from your own childhood
  • TARGET PRACTICE READY - Includes 4 bright orange suction tipped darts and 2 round standing targets for hours of fun and developing precision and concentration
  • SAFE SOFT DARTS - The soft squishy darts will prevent ricochet worries or sibling injuries
  • AGES: 4+ | MAKES A GREAT GIFT

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MAV-DB220
  • UPC: 687554223248
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: Small

Ages: 4+
